content.speakerText: The team is going to karaoke after dinner—want to come?
content.speakerTextCn: 团队下班后去唱K，一起来吗？
expectedAnswers: I’d love to, but I’ve got a late Zoom call. Maybe next time?
Karaoke? I’m not the best singer—but I’ll come if you promise not to make me go first!
I’m a bit tired tonight, but I really appreciate the invite. Let me know when you plan the next one!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰拒绝但保持积极态度，提供替代方案或未来意愿
语言准确性：使用自然口语结构，如 'I’d love to, but...', 'I’m a bit tired', 'Let me know'
表达自然度：语气真诚、有幽默感或共情，符合职场社交语境
关键词覆盖：使用了 'appreciate the invite', 'next time', 'plan the next one' 等场景高频表达
